violations.text: The following was observed to be in need of repair/adjustment... - The 2 far left doors to the customer side of the walk-in cooler were observed not shutting properly leaving a gap between the door and the frame of the door. - The sealed ceiling surface in the walk-in cooler was observed to be worn/thin and in need of resealing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

The outdoor areas were observed to have a buildup of debris/old equipment. Outdoor areas are to be maintained to prevent harborage conditions for rodents and other pests. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
